# Lip-Sync

- Route: `/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/videoTolip`
- Source API mapping path: `/src/docs/apiReference/model/videoTolip/api.ts`
- Source chunk: `https://s16-kling.klingai.com/kos/s101/nlav112918/api-doc/assets/api-Bn9EYWAo.js`

## Endpoint IDs

- `identify-face`
- `create-lip-sync`
- `query-lip-sync-single`
- `query-lip-sync-list`

## Endpoint Paths

- `/v1/videos/identify-face`
- `/v1/videos/advanced-lip-sync`
- `/v1/videos/advanced-lip-sync/{id}`

## Raw API Chunk Source

```javascript
const e={title:{en:"Lip-Sync",zh:"对口型"},endpoints:[{id:"identify-face",method:"POST",path:"/v1/videos/identify-face",title:{en:"Identify Face",zh:"人脸识别"},description:{en:"Identify faces in the video for lip-sync processing.",zh:"识别视频中的人脸以进行对口型处理。"},headers:[{name:"Content-Type",type:"string",required:!0,default:"application/json",description:{en:"Data Exchange Format",zh:"数据交换格式"}},{name:"Authorization",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Authentication information, refer to API authentication",zh:"鉴权信息，参考接口鉴权"}}],requestBody:[{name:"video_id",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"The ID of the video generated by Kling AI",zh:"通过可灵 AI 生成的视频的 ID"},notes:[{en:"- Used to specify the video and determine whether it can be used for lip-sync services.",zh:"- 用于指定视频、判断视频是否可用于对口型服务"},{en:"- This parameter and 'video_url' are mutually exclusive—only one can be filled, and neither can be left empty.",zh:"- 与 video_url 参数二选一填写，不能同时为空，也不能同时有值"},{en:"- Only supports videos generated within the last 30 days with a duration of no more than 60 seconds.",zh:"- 仅支持使用 30 天内生成的时长不超过 60 秒的视频"}]},{name:"video_url",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"The URL of the video",zh:"所上传视频的获取 URL"},notes:[{en:"- Used to specify the video and determine whether it can be used for lip-sync services.",zh:"- 用于指定视频，并判断视频是否可用于对口型服务"},{en:"- This parameter and 'video_id' are mutually exclusive—only one can be filled, and neither can be left empty.",zh:"- 与 video_id 参数二选一填写，不能同时为空，也不能同时有值"},{en:"- Supported video formats: .mp4/.mov, file size ≤100MB, duration 2s–60s, resolution 720p or 1080p, with both width and height between 512px–2160px. If validation fails, an error code will be returned.",zh:"- 视频文件支持 .mp4/.mov，文件大小不超过 100MB，视频时长不超过 60s 且不短于 2s，仅支持 720p 和 1080p、长宽的边长均位于 512px~2160px 之间，上述校验不通过会返回错误码等信息"},{en:"- The system checks video content—if issues are detected, an error code will be returned.",zh:"- 系统会校验视频内容，如有问题会返回错误码等信息"}]}],responseExample:{zh:'{\n  "code": 0, // 错误码；具体定义见错误码\n  "message": "string", // 错误信息\n  "request_id": "string", // 请求ID，系统生成，用于跟踪请求、排查问题\n  "data": {\n    "session_id": "id", // 会话ID\n    "final_unit_deduction": "string", // 任务最终扣减积分数值\n    "face_data": [ //人脸数据列表\n      {\n        "face_id": "string", // 人脸ID\n        "face_image": "url", // 人脸图片URL\n        "start_time": 0, // 人脸出现开始时间，单位ms\n        "end_time": 5200 //人脸出现结束时间，单位ms\n      }\n    ]\n  }\n}',en:'{\n  "code": 0, // Error codes; Specific definitions can be found in "Error Code"\n  "message": "string", // Error information\n  "request_id": "string", // Request ID, generated by the system, used to track requests and troubleshoot problems\n  "data": {\n    "session_id": "id", // Session ID\n    "final_unit_deduction": "string", // The deduction units of task\n    "face_data": [ //Face data list\n      {\n        "face_id": "string", // Face ID\n        "face_image": "url", // Face image URL\n        "start_time": 0, // Face appearance start time, unit: ms\n        "end_time": 5200 //Face appearance end time, unit: ms\n      }\n    ]\n  }\n}'},codeExamples:[{language:"cURL",code:{zh:'curl --request POST \\\n  --url https://api-beijing.klingai.com/v1/videos/identify-face \\\n  --header \'Authorization: Bearer <token>\' \\\n  --header \'Content-Type: application/json\' \\\n  --data \'{\n    "video_url": "https://p1-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-qa-test/kling20260206mp4.mp4",\n    "video_id": ""\n  }\'',en:'curl --request POST \\\n  --url https://api-singapore.klingai.com/v1/videos/identify-face \\\n  --header \'Authorization: Bearer <token>\' \\\n  --header \'Content-Type: application/json\' \\\n  --data \'{\n    "video_url": "https://p1-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-qa-test/kling20260206mp4.mp4",\n    "video_id": ""\n  }\''}}]},{id:"create-lip-sync",method:"POST",path:"/v1/videos/advanced-lip-sync",title:{en:"Create Task",zh:"创建任务"},headers:[{name:"Content-Type",type:"string",required:!0,default:"application/json",description:{en:"Data Exchange Format",zh:"数据交换格式"}},{name:"Authorization",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Authentication information, refer to API authentication",zh:"鉴权信息，参考接口鉴权"}}],requestBody:[{name:"session_id",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Session ID generated during the identify face API. It remains unchanged during the selection/editing process.",zh:"会话 ID，会基于对口型人脸识别接口生成"}},{name:"face_choose",type:"array",required:!0,description:{en:"Specified Face for Lip-Sync",zh:"指定人脸对口型"},notes:[{en:"- Includes Face ID, lip movement reference data, etc.",zh:"- 包括人脸 ID、口型参考等内容等"},{en:"- Currently only supports one person lip-sync.",zh:"- 暂时仅支持指定单人对口型"}],children:[{name:"face_id",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Face ID",zh:"人脸 ID"},notes:[{en:"- Returned by the facial recognition interface.",zh:"- 由人脸识别接口返回"}]},{name:"audio_id",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Sound ID Generated via TTS API",zh:"通过试听接口生成的音频的 ID"},notes:[{en:"- Only supports audio generated within the last 30 days with a duration of no less than 2 seconds and no more than 60 seconds.",zh:"- 仅支持使用 30 天内生成的、时长不短于 2 秒且不超过 60 秒的音频"},{en:"- Either audio_id or sound_file must be provided (mutually exclusive; cannot be empty or both populated).",zh:"- audio_id、sound_file 参数二选一，不能同时为空，也不能同时有值"}]},{name:"sound_file",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Sound File",zh:"音频文件"},notes:[{en:"- Supports Base64-encoded audio or accessible audio URL.",zh:"- 支持传入音频 Base64 编码或图音频 URL（确保可访问）"},{en:"- Accepted formats: .mp3/.wav/.m4a (max 5MB). Format mismatches or oversized files will return error codes.",zh:"- 音频文件支持 .mp3/.wav/.m4a，文件大小不超过 5MB，格式不匹配或文件过大会返回错误码等信息"},{en:"- Only supports audio with a duration of no less than 2 seconds and no more than 60 seconds.",zh:"- 仅支持使用时长不短于 2 秒且不长于 60 秒的音频"},{en:"- Either audio_id or sound_file must be provided (mutually exclusive; cannot be empty or both populated).",zh:"- audio_id、sound_file 参数二选一，不能同时为空，也不能同时有值"},{en:"- The system will verify the audio content and return error codes if there are any problems.",zh:"- 系统会校验音频内容，如有问题会返回错误码等信息"}]},{name:"sound_start_time",type:"long",required:!0,description:{en:"Time point to start cropping sound",zh:"音频裁剪起点时间"},notes:[{en:"- Based on the original sound start time, the start time is 0'0\", units: ms",zh:"- 以原始音频开始时间为准，开始时间为 0 分 0 秒，单位 ms"},{en:"- The sound before the starting point will be cropped, and the cropped sound must not be shorter than 2 seconds.",zh:"- 起点之前的音频会被裁剪，裁剪后音频不得短于 2 秒"}]},{name:"sound_end_time",type:"long",required:!0,description:{en:"Time point to stop cropping sound",zh:"音频裁剪终点时间"},notes:[{en:"- Based on the original sound start time, the start time is 0'0\", units: ms",zh:"- 以原始音频开始时间为准，开始时间为 0 分 0 秒，单位 ms"},{en:"- The sound after the end point will be cropped, and the cropped sound must not be shorter than 2 seconds.",zh:"- 终点之后的音频会被裁剪，裁剪后音频不得短于 2 秒"},{en:"- The end point time shouldn't be later than the total duration of the original sound.",zh:"- 终点时间不得晚于原始音频总时长"}]},{name:"sound_insert_time",type:"long",required:!0,description:{en:"The time for inserting cropped sound",zh:"裁剪后音频插入时间"},notes:[{en:"- Based on the original video start time, the start time is 0'0\", units: ms",zh:"- 以视频开始时间为准，视频开始时间为 0 分 0 秒，单位 ms"},{en:"- The time range for inserting sound should overlap with the face's lip-sync time interval for at least 2 seconds.",zh:"- 插入音频的时间范围与该人脸可对口型时间区间至少重合 2 秒时长"},{en:"- The start time for inserting sound must not be earlier than the start time of the video, and the end time for inserting sound must not be later than the end time of the video.",zh:"- 插入音频的开始时间不得早于视频开始时间，插入音频的结束时间不得晚于视频结束时间"}]},{name:"sound_volume",type:"float",required:!1,default:"1",description:{en:"Volume Controls (higher values = louder)",zh:"音频音量大小；值越大，音量越大"},notes:[{en:"- Value range: [0, 2]",zh:"- 取值范围：[0, 2]"}]},{name:"original_audio_volume",type:"float",required:!1,default:"1",description:{en:"Original video volume (higher values = louder)",zh:"原始视频音量大小；值越大，音量越大"},notes:[{en:"- Value range: [0, 2]",zh:"- 取值范围：[0, 2]"},{en:"- No effect if source video is silent.",zh:"- 原视频无声时，当前参数无效果"}]}]},{name:"watermark_info",type:"object",required:!1,description:{en:"Whether to generate watermarked results simultaneously",zh:"是否同时生成含水印的结果"},notes:[{en:'- Defined by the enabled parameter, format: \n```json\n  "watermark_info": { "enabled": boolean } \n```',zh:'- 通过enabled参数定义，具体格式如下：\n```json\n "watermark_info": { "enabled": boolean } \n```'},{en:"- true: generate watermarked result, false: do not generate",zh:"- true 为生成，false 为不生成"},{en:"- Custom watermarks are not currently supported",zh:"- 暂不支持自定义水印"}]},{name:"external_task_id",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Custom Task ID",zh:"自定义任务 ID"},notes:[{en:"- User-defined task ID. It will not override the system-generated task ID, but supports querying tasks by this ID.",zh:"- 用户自定义任务 ID，传入不会覆盖系统生成的任务 ID，但支持通过该 ID 进行任务查询"},{en:"- Please note that uniqueness must be ensured for each user.",zh:"- 请注意，单用户下需要保证唯一性"}]},{name:"callback_url",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"The callback notification address for the result of this task. If configured, the server will actively notify when the task status changes.",zh:"本次任务结果回调通知地址，如果配置，服务端会在任务状态发生变更时主动通知"},notes:[{en:"- For specific message schema, see [Callback Protocol](/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/callbackProtocol)",zh:"- 具体通知的消息 schema 见 [Callback 协议](/cn/dev/document-api/apiReference/callbackProtocol)"}]}],responseExample:{zh:'{\n  "code": 0, // globally unique\n          "url": "string", // URL for generating videos (Please note that for security purposes, generated images/videos will be deleted after 30 days. Please save them promptly.)\n          "watermark_url": "string", // Watermarked video download URL, anti-hotlinking format\n          "duration": "string" //Total video duration, unit: s\n        }\n      "id": "string", // Generated video ID; globally unique\n            "url": "string", // URL for generating videos (Please note that for security purposes, generated images/videos will be deleted after 30 days. Please save them promptly.)\n            "watermark_url": "string", // Watermarked video download URL, anti-hotlinking format\n            "duration": "string" //Total video duration, unit: s\n          }\n        ]\n      },\n      "created_at": 1722769557708, // Task creation time, Unix timestamp, unit: ms\n      "updated_at": 1722769557708 //Task update time, Unix timestamp, unit: ms\n    }\n  ]\n}'},codeExamples:[{language:"cURL",code:{zh:"curl --request GET \\\n  --url 'https://api-beijing.klingai.com/v1/videos/advanced-lip-sync?pageNum=1&pageSize=30' \\\n  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'",en:"curl --request GET \\\n  --url 'https://api-singapore.klingai.com/v1/videos/advanced-lip-sync?pageNum=1&pageSize=30' \\\n  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'"}}]}]};export{e as apiData};
```
